[30;1m35 | [0m[35m * `show-md hide-gt-sm` should show from 0px to 960px and hide at >960px[0m
[30;1m36 | [0m[35m * `hide-gt-md show-gt-sm` should show everywhere (show overrides hide)`[0m
[30;1m37 | [0m[35m *[0m
[30;1m38 | [0m[35m *  hide means hide everywhere[0m

[30;1m40 | [0m[35m### Why is an asset cache needed for Codepen?[0m
[30;1m41 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m42 | [0m[35mComponents within AngularJS Material at times use icons or SVG.  Images[0m
[30;1m43 | [0m[35mare fetched over http.  Without having a server that will allow cross[0m
[30;1m44 | [0m[35msite scripting (`Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *`), the request will[0m
[30;1m45 | [0m[35mfail with a [CORS](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Access_control_CORS)[0m

[30;1m34 | [0m[35m## <a name="asset_cache"></a> Asset Cache[0m
[30;1m35 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m36 | [0m[35mSVG images are stored in an asset cache using `$templateCache`.  A[0m
[30;1m37 | [0m[35mscript is delivered to codepen that initializes the cache within the[0m
[30;1m38 | [0m[35mdemo module.[0m
[30;1m39 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m40 | [0m[35m### Why is an asset cache needed for Codepen?[0m
